task: Apply Day 0 answer deletion UX to Day 1 and future training stages

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real verification before reporting done, and code or UI changes require completion evidence.
Code, deploy, UI, and customer-facing answer changes require real entrypoint verification and completion evidence guard.

changes: Added the Day 0 delete, delete-confirm, and cancel controls to the shared post-Day-0 StageConceptBlock.
Connected post-Day-0 answer deletion to the existing deleteCoachAnswer handler so deletion updates local draft state and server sync consistently.
Changed the post-Day-0 duplicate-answer hint to match Day 0: deleting allows the same question to be answered again.
